# Digital Craft Tbilisi

> Web development and SEO agency based in Tbilisi, Georgia. We build high-performance websites for Georgian and regional businesses, providing custom web development, technical SEO, and content strategy. Primary markets: Georgia, Azerbaijan. Languages: English, Russian, Georgian.

Digital Craft specializes in custom websites, landing pages, e-commerce platforms, and SEO optimization for businesses in Georgia and the South Caucasus region. The agency operates at digital-craft-tbilisi.site and serves clients via WhatsApp, Telegram, and phone (+995 591 102 653).

## Services

- [Custom Web Development](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/services/custom-web-development-tbilisi/): Custom websites and web applications for Georgian businesses — landing pages, SPAs, e-commerce, Firebase backend, CMS integration.
- [SEO Optimization](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/services/seo-optimization-tbilisi/): Technical SEO, on-page optimization, hreflang for .ge domains, keyword research, and content strategy for the Georgian market.

## Portfolio

- [Tech Case Study — This Portfolio](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/portfolio/tech-case-study-this-portfolio/): Deep dive into the agency's own SPA website built with Firebase backend and a custom CMS with dynamic SEO.
- [Minankari.art E-commerce](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/portfolio/case-study-minankari-art-ecommerce/): Custom e-commerce platform for a Georgian cloisonné enamel artist targeting a global audience.

## Blog

- [Your Website: An Asset or an Expense?](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/why-your-website-should-be-a-marketing-tool/): Why most Georgian business websites fail to attract clients and how to turn them into a 24/7 sales tool.
- [How to Create a Restaurant Website in Tbilisi](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/restaurant-website-tbilisi/): Features, local SEO, booking systems, and costs for restaurant websites in Georgia (2026).
- [7 Critical SEO Mistakes in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/7-critical-seo-mistakes-in-georgia/): The most common errors holding back 90% of Georgian websites.
- [Black Hat SEO Risks in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/black-hat-seo-risks-georgia/): 12 banned SEO methods and how to spot unethical contractors in Georgia.
- [Website Launch Checklist in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/website-launch-checklist-georgia/): 10-point checklist for launching a website ready to attract customers.
- [Landing Page vs. Website](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/landing-page-vs-website/): Pros, cons, and best use cases for businesses in Georgia.
- [Keyword Research Guide for Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/the-art-of-keyword-research-in-georgia/): How to find high-intent keywords for the Georgian market.
- [SEO & Content Marketing in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/content-marketing-and-seo-in-georgia/): Localized strategies for keyword research, language choice, and technical SEO.
- [SEO for Medical Clinics in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/seo-for-medical-clinics-georgia/): Ethical SEO for healthcare providers in Georgia.
- [E-commerce SEO in Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/ecommerce-seo-georgia-market-guide/): Market guide based on TBC Capital data on Georgia's growing e-commerce sector.
- [When to Start SEO](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/when-to-start-seo/): Why postponing SEO during web development is a costly mistake.
- [Web Development in Azerbaijan](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/web-development-azerbaijan/): Complete guide to building a successful website in Azerbaijan, including Baku market specifics.
- [Duplicate Content SEO Audit](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/duplicate-content-seo-audit-georgia/): How duplicate content harms Google rankings and how to fix it, with case study (+63% traffic in 3 months).
- [Technical SEO Checklist for Georgia](https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/technical-seo-checklist-georgia/): 14 technical requirements for launching a website that ranks in Georgia — redirects, page speed, hreflang, canonicals.
